original_abstract: Transformation represents a core dimension of the human spiritual experience and serves as a foundational pillar within the academic study of Christian Spirituality. At its heart, transformation involves the profound and enduring shifts that occur within individuals as they encounter the Divine, maturing in both their lived experience of faith and the outward expression of their beliefs. This article situates this transformative dynamic within the specific framework of Biblical Spirituality, beginning with a concise overview of the discipline. After exploring the conceptual nuances of transformation in detail, the discussion examines its inherent relationship with and manifestation throughout the biblical text.
humanized_abstract: Transformation is a key dimension of the human spiritual experience and a central focus of the academic discipline of Christian Spirituality. Transformation refers to the process and experience of significant and lasting change occurring in an individual as they encounter Divine Reality and grow in their experience of faith and its expression. This paper focuses on transformation within the context of Biblical Spirituality following a brief introduction to this discipline. The article provides an in-depth exploration of the concept of transformation, as well as an analysis of the relationship of and the presence of transformation throughout the biblical text.
